name: Courage Investment Group Limited
summary: Courage Investment Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides marine transportation services in Hong Kong and other Asian countries. The company also trades in merchandise, including consumable goods relating to infant, personal care products, and electronic components; holds and invests in properties; and invests in securities and corporate bonds. In addition, it offers management services. The company was formerly known as Courage Marine Group Limited and changed its name to Courage Investment Group Limited in September 2017. Courage Investment Group Limited has a strategic cooperation agreement with Shandong Sooc Education Technology Stock Corp. Ltd. for online marine crew training market. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
